The '''Corellian powersuit''' was a suit of [[Power armor/Legends|powered]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] of [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] origin. It employed an energized [[exoskeleton]] that included a series of [[Servomotor/Legends|servomotors]]. These characteristics enhanced the wearer's strength. The armor was favored by professional [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. From [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], a typical suit would have cost ten thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and weighed approximately eighteen [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]].<ref name="RPG-Core" />
